name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Simple diagonal
description: Section divider with single diagonal SVG edge between sections.

name: Double diagonal
description: Section divider with stacked dual-diagonal cut creating layered section separation.

name: Crossed diagonal
description: Section divider with crossed diagonal lines for an angular transition effect.

name: Triangle
description: Section divider with single triangular separator wedge between blocks.

name: Layered mountains
description: Section divider with multi-peak layered shape divider inspired by mountain silhouettes.

name: Waves
description: Section divider with curved wave separators with repeating crest shapes.

name: Stacked curves
description: Section divider with multiple curve layers for soft tiered separation.

name: Curved arc
description: Section divider with single arc-shaped divider with smooth curvature.

name: Inverted curve
description: Section divider with inverted arc shape dipping into the next section.

name: Zigzag
description: Section divider with repeating zigzag edge for sharp rhythmic separation.

name: Torn paper
description: Section divider with ragged torn-edge style divider for textured transitions.

name: Gradient fade
description: Section divider with gradient fade line that softly blends two sections.

name: Noise texture fade
description: Section divider with faded divider with noise texture overlay for grain.

name: Pulse line
description: Section divider with animated pulse line divider for subtle motion emphasis.

name: Diamond chain
description: Section divider with repeating diamond motif along a horizontal separator.

name: Gradient glow line
description: Section divider with glowing gradient line used as a luminous separator.

name: Chevron arrow
description: Section divider with chevron arrow motif guiding visual flow between sections.
